mission.title: containerd: Add dial timeout field to hosts toml configuration
mission.description:
This change adds a dial timeout field to the hosts toml configuration to reduce the impact of a registry which is town or unable to connect to.

Fixes #10660

resolution.summary: @phillebaba Thanks for your PR. If you are busy, I'm happy to carry this PR.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
